user.title: Foxtron DALI
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Foxtron DALI gateway.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the DALI gateway. Please check the host and port and try again.

abort.already_configured: This DALI gateway is already configured.

start_discovery.title: Start Button Pairing
start_discovery.description: Activate discovery mode for 5 minutes to pair physical DALI switches. Press Upper then Lower on the switch within 5 seconds to register it.

set_fade_time.title: Set Fade Time
set_fade_time.description: Set the default DALI fade time (0-15) for all lights on this bus.

abort.discovery_started: Pairing mode activated for 5 minutes. Press Upper then Lower on the switch to register it.
